arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS CodeBuild fleet.

base_capacity.description: The initial number of compute resources allocated to the AWS CodeBuild fleet.

compute_type.description: The type of compute resources used by the AWS CodeBuild fleet, such as BUILD_GENERAL1_SMALL.

created.description: The date and time when the AWS CodeBuild fleet was created.

environment_type.description: The type of environment used by the AWS CodeBuild fleet, such as LINUX_CONTAINER.

fleet_service_role.description: The IAM role that AWS CodeBuild assumes during execution of the fleet.

id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS CodeBuild fleet.

image_id.description: The ID of the Docker image used for builds in the AWS CodeBuild fleet.

last_modified.description: The date and time when the AWS CodeBuild fleet was last modified.

overflow_behavior.description: The behavior of the fleet when it reaches its maximum capacity, such as QUEUE or CANCEL.

scaling_configuration.description: The configuration for scaling the AWS CodeBuild fleet, including desired capacity and scaling strategies.

status.description: The current status of the AWS CodeBuild fleet, including any messages and status codes.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS CodeBuild fleet for identification and organization.

vpc_config.description: The VPC configuration for the AWS CodeBuild fleet, including security groups and subnets.
